title: Junior Full stack Developer (Entry Level)
description:
About Gain City

At Gain City, we deliver expertise andquality solutions in air-conditioning, home appliances and consumerelectronics. Established in 1981, Gain City is a trusted household name inSingapore. We take pride in our strong customer focus, innovative spirit andcommitment to service excellence. With a dynamic workforce and a network ofstores and service centres island wide, we offer a vibrant and growth-orientedenvironment where employees are empowered to thrive, take ownership and make areal impact.

About the Job

We are looking for a motivated Junior Full stackDeveloper to join our team. In this role, you will help develop and maintainweb applications and services, focusing on high performance and scalability.This is an entry-level position where you will work closely withcross-functional teams and experienced developers to deliver top-notchsolutions while rapidly growing your technical skillset.

Responsibilities:

·      Application Development: Help develop and maintainweb applications and services, ensuring they are robust and performant.

·      Architecture & Design: Assist in implementingclient-side and server-side architectures and collaborate with designers tocreate user-friendly interfaces.

·      Code Quality: Write clean, efficient, and reliablecode while optimizing applications for speed.

·      Debugging: Participate in troubleshooting anddebugging applications to resolve issues and ensure optimal performance.

·      Continuous Learning: Stay up-to-date with emergingtechnologies and industry trends, including applying new technologies like Tuyato improve our IoT operations.

·      Collaboration: Work with stakeholders and managersto understand requirements and help translate them into technical tasks.

·      DevOps Support: Support the implementation andmaintenance of automated testing and CI/CD pipelines.

Requirements:

·      Education: Diploma in Computer Science, Engineering,or a related field.

·      Foundational Knowledge: Strong understanding of front-endtechnologies (HTML,C, JavaScript) and basic experience with frameworks likeReact or Angular.

·      Backend Basics: Familiarity with back-endlanguages/frameworks such as Node.js or .NET.

·      Databases: Basic understanding of databases (e.g.,MySQL, MongoDB) and an interest in learning message brokers like RabbitMQ.

·      Version Control: Familiarity with tools such as Gitand an interest in learning Docker.

·      Software Lifecycle: Understanding of the softwaredevelopment lifecycle (SDLC) and Agile methodologies.

·      Soft Skills: Excellent problem-solving skills, highattention to detail, and a strong desire to work collaboratively in a teamenvironment.

Highly Advantageous:

·      Microsoft Stack: Familiarity with C, MicrosoftDynamics NAV, or Business Central (BC).

·      Cloud Awareness: Basic exposure to cloud platformssuch as Azure, AWS, or GCP.

·      IoT Interest: Practical experience or a stronginterest in IoT platforms, particularly Tuya.

Take Note:
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted
We are moving the office to Tampines around mid-year
